pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@rgb@stroke{0}{0}{0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@color@rgb@fill{0}{0}{0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@setlinewidth{\the% \pgflinewidth}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\nullfont\hbox 7647pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@curveto{136.27647pt}{1.91077pt}{134.3657pt}{0.0pt}{1% 32.00859pt}{0.0pt}\pgfsys@lineto{4.26788pt}{0.0pt}\pgfsys@curveto{1.91077pt}{0% 26788pt}\pgfsys@curveto{134.85385pt}{2.69647pt}{133.58pt}{1.42262pt}{132.00859% pt}{1.42262pt}\pgfsys@lineto{4.26788pt}{1.42262pt}\pgfsys@curveto{2.69647pt}{1% .42262pt}{1.42262pt}{2.69647pt}{1.42262pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@closepath% \pgfsys@fill\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope% \pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@setdash{\pgf@temp}{\the\pgf@x}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0.25,0.25,0.25}% \pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0.25}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0.25}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@stroke@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{}\pgfsys@moveto{% 1.42262pt}{157.43866pt}\pgfsys@lineto{134.85385pt}{157.43866pt}\pgfsys@stroke% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{% }}{{}}{{}}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0% }{1.0}{15.64897pt}{440.5149pt}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{1,1,1}% \definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{1,1,1}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{1}% \pgfsys@color@gray@fill{1}\hbox{\minipage[b]{104.97853pt}\color[rgb]{1,1,1}% \definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{1,1,1}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{1}% \pgfsys@color@gray@fill{1}\ignorespaces\ignorespaces GSM8K\endminipage}}}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope% \pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{% {{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0}{1.0}{15.64897pt}{165.97447pt}\pgfsys@invoke% { }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}% \pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\hbox{\minipage[b]{104.9% 7853pt}\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}% \pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\ignorespaces% \ignorespaces When \lx@texthl@color{Sophie} watches her \lx@texthl@color{% nephew}, she gets out a variety of toys for him. The bag of building blocks % has \lx@texthl@color{31} blocks in it. The bin of stuffed animals has % \lx@texthl@color{8} stuffed animals inside. The tower of stacking rings has % \lx@texthl@color{9} multicolored rings on it. \lx@texthl@color{Sophie} % recently bought a tube of bouncy balls, bringing her total number of toys for % her \lx@texthl@color{nephew} up to \lx@texthl@color{62}. How many bouncy balls% came in the tube? \vskip 49.79231pt\endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}% \pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0}{1.0}{15.% 64897pt}{9.95842pt}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[% named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}% \pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\hbox{\minipage[b]{104.97853pt}\color[rgb]{0,0,0}% \definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}% \pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\ignorespaces\ignorespaces Let T be the number of % bouncy balls in the tube.\\ After buying the tube of balls, \lx@texthl@color{Sophie} has \lx@texthl@color{% 31}+\lx@texthl@color{8}+\lx@texthl@color{9}+ T = {48} + T =\lx@texthl@color{62% } toys for her \lx@texthl@color{nephew}.\\ Thus, T =\lx@texthl@color{62}-{48} = $<$$<$\lx@texthl@color{62}-48=% \lx@texthl@color{14}$>$$>$\lx@texthl@color{14} bouncy balls came in the tube. \endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope{}{}{}\hss}\pgfsys@discardpath\pgfsys@invoke{% }\pgfsys@endscope\hss}}\endpgfpicture}}

inline-block.p: When Sophie watches her nephew, she gets out a variety of toys for him. The bag of building blocks has 31 blocks in it. The bin of stuffed animals has 8 stuffed animals inside. The tower of stacking rings has 9 multicolored rings on it. Sophie recently bought a tube of bouncy balls, bringing her total number of toys for her nephew up to 62. How many bouncy balls came in the tube?
Let T be the number of bouncy balls in the tube.
After buying the tube of balls, Sophie has 31+8+9+ T = 48 + T =62 toys for her nephew.

Thus, T =62-48 =
<
<
62-48=14
>
>
14 bouncy balls came in the tube.

picture.tex: \hbox to205.28pt{\vbox to451.62pt{\pgfpicture\makeatletter\hbox{\thinspace% \lower 0.0pt\hbox to0.0pt{\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\definecolor{% pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@rgb@stroke{0}{0}{0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@color@rgb@fill{0}{0}{0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@setlinewidth{\the% \pgflinewidth}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\nullfont\hbox to0.0pt{\pgfsys@beginscope% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}{}{}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}{}{}{}{}{}{}% \definecolor[named]{pgffillcolor}{rgb}{0.25,0.25,0.25}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{% 0.25}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{{}{}{{}}}{{}{% }{{}}}{}{}{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}% {}{}\pgfsys@moveto{0.0pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@lineto{0.0pt}{447.3482pt}% \pgfsys@curveto{0.0pt}{449.70532pt}{1.91077pt}{451.61609pt}{4.26788pt}{451.616% 09pt}\pgfsys@lineto{201.00754pt}{451.61609pt}\pgfsys@curveto{203.36465pt}{451.% 61609pt}{205.27542pt}{449.70532pt}{205.27542pt}{447.3482pt}\pgfsys@lineto{205.% 27542pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@curveto{205.27542pt}{1.91077pt}{203.36465pt}{0.0pt}% {201.00754pt}{0.0pt}\pgfsys@lineto{4.26788pt}{0.0pt}\pgfsys@curveto{1.91077pt}% {0.0pt}{0.0pt}{1.91077pt}{0.0pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@closepath\pgfsys@fill% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}{}{}{}{}{}{}\definecolor[named]{pgffillcolor}{rgb}{% 0.95,0.95,0.95}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0.95}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}{{}{}{{}}}{{% }{}{{}}}{}{}\pgfsys@moveto{1.42262pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@lineto{1.42262pt}{434.% 19144pt}\pgfsys@lineto{203.8528pt}{434.19144pt}\pgfsys@lineto{203.8528pt}{4.26% 788pt}\pgfsys@curveto{203.8528pt}{2.69647pt}{202.57895pt}{1.42262pt}{201.00754% pt}{1.42262pt}\pgfsys@lineto{4.26788pt}{1.42262pt}\pgfsys@curveto{2.69647pt}{1% .42262pt}{1.42262pt}{2.69647pt}{1.42262pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@closepath% \pgfsys@fill\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope% \pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@setdash{\pgf@temp}{\the\pgf@x}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0.25,0.25,0.25}% \pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0.25}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0.25}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@stroke@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{}\pgfsys@moveto{% 1.42262pt}{143.6754pt}\pgfsys@lineto{203.8528pt}{143.6754pt}\pgfsys@stroke% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{% }}{{}}{{}}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0% }{1.0}{15.64897pt}{440.40376pt}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{1,1,1}% \definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{1,1,1}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{1}% \pgfsys@color@gray@fill{1}\hbox{\minipage[b]{173.97748pt}\color[rgb]{1,1,1}% \definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{1,1,1}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{1}% \pgfsys@color@gray@fill{1}\ignorespaces\ignorespaces GSM Symbolic Template% \endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke% { }\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0}{1.0}{15.64897pt}{154.15564pt}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{% rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\hbox{% \minipage[b]{173.97748pt}\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}% {rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}% \ignorespaces\ignorespaces When \lx@texthl@color{\{name\}} watches her % \lx@texthl@color{\{family\}}, she gets out a variety of toys for him. The bag % of building blocks has \lx@texthl@color{\{x\}} blocks in it. The bin of % stuffed animals has \lx@texthl@color{\{y\}} stuffed animals inside. The tower % of stacking rings has \lx@texthl@color{\{z\}} multicolored rings on it. % \lx@texthl@color{\{name\}} recently bought a tube of bouncy balls, bringing % her total number of toys she bought for her \lx@texthl@color{\{family\}} up to% \lx@texthl@color{\{total\}}. How many bouncy balls came in the tube?\\ \\ \par\#variables:\\ - \lx@texthl@color{name} = sample(names)\\ - \lx@texthl@color{family} = sample(["nephew", "cousin", "brother"])\\ - \lx@texthl@color{x} = range(5, 100)\\ - \lx@texthl@color{y} = range(5, 100)\\ - \lx@texthl@color{z} = range(5, 100)\\ - \lx@texthl@color{total} = range(100, 500)\\ - \lx@texthl@color{ans} = range(85, 200)\\ \par\#conditions:\\ - \lx@texthl@color{x} + \lx@texthl@color{y} + \lx@texthl@color{z} + % \lx@texthl@color{ans} == \lx@texthl@color{total}\\ \par\endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke% { }\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0}{1.0}{15.64897pt}{56.19516pt}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{% rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\hbox{% \minipage[b]{173.97748pt}\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}% {rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}% \ignorespaces\ignorespaces Let T be the number of bouncy balls in the tube. % After buying the tube of balls, \lx@texthl@color{\{name\}} has % \lx@texthl@color{\{x\}} + \lx@texthl@color{\{y\}} + \lx@texthl@color{\{z\}} + % T = \{\lx@texthl@color{x}+\lx@texthl@color{y}+\lx@texthl@color{z}\} + T = % \lx@texthl@color{\{total\}} toys for her \lx@texthl@color{\{family\}}.\\ \par Thus, T = \lx@texthl@color{\{total\}} - \{\lx@texthl@color{x}+% \lx@texthl@color{y}+\lx@texthl@color{z}\} = \lx@texthl@color{\{ans\}} bouncy % balls came in the tube. \endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope{}{}{}\hss}\pgfsys@discardpath\pgfsys@invoke{% }\pgfsys@endscope\hss}}\endpgfpicture}}

inline-block.p: When {name} watches her {family}, she gets out a variety of toys for him. The bag of building blocks has {x} blocks in it. The bin of stuffed animals has {y} stuffed animals inside. The tower of stacking rings has {z} multicolored rings on it. {name} recently bought a tube of bouncy balls, bringing her total number of toys she bought for her {family} up to {total}. How many bouncy balls came in the tube?
Let T be the number of bouncy balls in the tube. After buying the tube of balls, {name} has {x} + {y} + {z} + T = {x+y+z} + T = {total} toys for her {family}.
Thus, T = {total} - {x+y+z} = {ans} bouncy balls came in the tube.

figure.toccaption: 1Illustration of the GSM-Symbolic template creation process.
figure.caption: Figure 1Illustration of the GSM-Symbolic template creation process.
